evals.prompt: Which VMs are over-provisioned? Show me rightsizing recommendations and remaining capacity
Generate a capacity report for the production cluster - how many days until we run out of resources?
expectations: Reports days remaining by resource type (CPU/memory/disk)

evals.prompt: Are there any anomalies in the last 24 hours? Create an alert definition for high CPU ready time
evals.expected_output: Anomaly list + new alert definition created
expectations: Uses create_alert_definition with CPU ready symptom
Confirms the new alert definition is active
